repost/share (RT line: 'We don't post winners after the fact...' transfers insider status)

hero.negativeSignalAudit: Win-led but honest (both Ls listed); no gloating adjectives; the one funnel line is a challenge, not a plea.
hero.continuity: Closes the noon-confession arc from 7/6; callback to Friday's Colombia max play; carries the week number forward without re-leading with it.
hero.screenshot: Graded July 6 results view — the five rows matching the tweet's checkmarks
hero.text:
Yesterday, graded. Every one of these was posted here before it started:

✅ Spain ML — even money, posted 15 minutes before kick
✅ Brewers ML — 4 units
✅ Arizona ML — the board's top-rated play of the night
❌ Astros ML — winning money backed off it late, the board cut the stake before first pitch. Saved 1.5 units on a loser.
❌ Belgium, small — the US had other plans. Happily paid that one.

+5.7 units on the night. +27 since last Monday.

We don't post winners after the fact. We post the board live and let it grade itself.

The first week is free. Watch one card start to finish — that's the whole pitch.

Today's already loaded: Argentina at noon. Colombia — Friday's max-play team — at 4.
hero.rtLine: We don't post winners after the fact. We post the board live and let it grade itself.
hero.selfReplyAt25min: Every number above is on the site, graded, with the timestamps. Same for today's card once it locks. nhlsavant.com/?ref=t0707a
hero.postWindow: 8:00-9:30 AM ET — morning coffee scroll; Argentina noon game gives it a natural 3h runway
hero.version: v2 — user rejected happy-L lead: TOP OF FUNNEL, wins first

gradePosts.argentinaWin:
Argentina handles it. ✅ 4 units at -285 isn't glamorous — it's just green.

Colombia +125 at 4 PM is the fun one. Same Colombia that cashed Friday's max.
gradePosts.argentinaLoss:
Argentina ML dies at noon and takes 4 units with it. Heavy favorites lose too — that's why the board sizes them, not us.

Colombia +125 at 4. The day isn't over.

replyNotes: @BullishonSports asked 'Is spain chalked then??' yesterday 2:25 PM — unanswered; a quick reply is a free community touch
@kagerandle rode USA and won — if he appears in replies, engage warmly; he's a 799-follower repeat engager
doNotDo: Do not re-lead with the +54u/all-time number — week number (+27) is the fresh one
Do not blame anything for the Belgium loss — the happy-L is the brand moment
Re-run socialBoard before the noon Argentina post window if quoting consensus numbers
